title: lycium chinense var. potaninii
intro: Lycium chinense var. potaninii, also known as Goji berry, is a plant species that belongs to the nightshade family. It is widely cultivated for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Lycium chinense var. potaninii include improved vision, boosted immune system, and reduced risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease and cancer. Lycium chinense var. potaninii is often used in herbal preparations like teas, capsules, and tinctures to promote overall health and well-being.
